name: the full-stack rule set denies a proposed TypeScript violation in memory before it is written
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"app.ts","content":"const x: any = 1;\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'g-ts-001' e.txt && grep -q 'write denied before save' e.txt && echo fullstack-denied-prewrite 1>&2
